  const woEl = document.getElementById('world-overlay');
  if (woEl) woEl.classList.toggle('digitize-active', !!activeLayerId && digitizing);
  const startBtn = document.getElementById('fpStartBtn');
  const stopBtn = document.getElementById('fpStopBtn');
  const selBtn2 = document.getElementById('fpSelectBtn');
  if (startBtn) startBtn.style.display = digitizing ? 'none' : '';
  if (stopBtn) stopBtn.style.display = digitizing ? '' : 'none';
  if (selBtn2) { selBtn2.disabled = digitizing; selBtn2.style.opacity = digitizing ? '0.4' : ''; selBtn2.style.cursor = digitizing ? 'not-allowed' : ''; }
}

function updateDigitizeStatus() {
  const layer = getActiveLayer();
  if (!layer) { digitizeStatus.textContent = 'Create a layer to start digitizing.'; return; }
  if (layer.geometry_type === 'point') {
    digitizeStatus.textContent = 'Click to place point.';
  } else if (layer.geometry_type === 'line') {
    digitizeStatus.textContent = isDrawing ? 'Click to add vertex, double-click to finish line.' : 'Click to add vertex, double-click to finish.';
  } else if (layer.geometry_type === 'polygon') {
    digitizeStatus.textContent = isDrawing ? 'Click to add vertex, double-click to finish polygon.' : 'Click to add vertex, double-click to finish.';
  }
}

function updateFeatSummary() {
  const el = document.getElementById('feat-summary');
  if (!el) return;
  const parts = layers.map(l => {
    const count = (allFeatures[l.label_id] || []).length;
    return count > 0 ? `<span style="margin-right:10px;"><strong>${l.name}</strong>: ${count} ${l.geometry_type}${count !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>` : null;
  }).filter(Boolean);
  el.innerHTML = parts.length ? parts.join('') : '';
}

function getActiveLayer() {
  return layers.find(l => l.label_id === activeLayerId) || null;
}

function hasAnyFeatures() {
  return layers.some(l => (l.count || 0) > 0);
}

function updateCoordDisplay(x, y) {
  const cd = document.getElementById('coordDisplay');
  if (!cd) return;
  if (scaleRatio > 0) {
    const inches = x / coordDPI;
    const realFt = inches * scaleRatio;
    const inchesY = y / coordDPI;
    const realFtY = inchesY * scaleRatio;
    cd.textContent = `X: ${realFt.toFixed(1)} ft  Y: ${realFtY.toFixed(1)} ft`;
  } else {
    cd.textContent = `X: ${Math.round(x)} px  Y: ${Math.round(y)} px`;
  }
}

async function fetchFeaturesForPage() {
  // Features are in world coords — fetch all pages at once
  const res = await fetch(`/features/${currentJobId}/all`);
  const data = await res.json();
  if (!res.ok) return;
  (data.layers || []).forEach(layer => {
    allFeatures[layer.label_id] = layer.features || [];
  });
  coordDPI = data.dpi || 300;
  const sd = document.getElementById('scaleDPI');
  if (sd) sd.value = String(coordDPI);
  drawOverlay();
}

exportBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
  if (!currentJobId) return;
  const fmt = (document.getElementById('exportFormat') || {}).value || 'gdb';
  const fmtLabels = { gdb: 'GDB', shp: 'Shapefile', geojson: 'GeoJSON', kml: 'KMZ' };
  trainStatus.textContent = 'Exporting...';
  exportBtn.disabled = true;
  const exres = await fetch(`/export/${currentJobId}`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      format: fmt,
      ref_lat: WORLD_REF_LATLNG ? WORLD_REF_LATLNG.lat : null,
      ref_lon: WORLD_REF_LATLNG ? WORLD_REF_LATLNG.lng : null
    })
  });
  const exdata = await exres.json();
  if (exres.status === 402 && exdata.checkout_url) {
    exportBtn.disabled = false;
    trainStatus.textContent = '';
    window.location.href = exdata.checkout_url;
    return;
  }
  if (!exres.ok) {
    exportBtn.disabled = false;
    trainStatus.textContent = '';
    alert(exdata && exdata.error ? exdata.error : 'Export failed');
    return;
  }
  pollTimer = setInterval(async () => {
    const sres = await fetch(`/status/${currentJobId}`);
    const sdata = await sres.json();
    if (sdata.log) { logEl.value = sdata.log.join('\\n'); statusLine.textContent = sdata.log.filter(l => l.trim()).slice(-1)[0] || ''; }
    if (typeof sdata.progress === 'number') progressEl.value = sdata.progress;
    if (sdata.status === 'done' || sdata.status === 'ready') {
      clearInterval(pollTimer);
      processBtn.disabled = false;
      exportBtn.disabled = false;
      trainStatus.textContent = 'Done. You can keep digitizing and export again.';
      window.location.href = `/download/${currentJobId}`;
    } else if (sdata.status === 'error') {
      clearInterval(pollTimer);
      processBtn.disabled = false;
      exportBtn.disabled = false;
      alert('Export failed. See log.');
    }
  }, 2000);
});

prevBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
  if (currentPage > 0) {
    await loadPage(currentPage - 1);
  }
});

nextBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
  if (currentPage < nPages - 1) {
    await loadPage(currentPage + 1);
  }
});

// ===========================================================================
// v7 — World canvas + Page Repository
// ===========================================================================

// ---- World transform ----
function applyWorldTransform() {
  const worldEl = document.getElementById('world');
  if (!worldEl) return;
  worldEl.style.transform = 'translate(' + worldTx + 'px,' + worldTy + 'px) scale(' + worldZoom + ')';
  worldEl.style.transformOrigin = '0 0';
  updateMapView();
  drawOverlay();
}

// ---- getActiveCanvas ----
function getActiveCanvas() {
  const entry = placedPages.find(p => p.pageIdx === activePageIdx);
  return entry ? entry.canvasEl : null;
}

// ---- World zoom/pan button wiring ----
document.getElementById('worldZoomInBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
  worldZoom = Math.min(worldZoom * 1.25, 8.0);
  applyWorldTransform();
  document.getElementById('worldZoomLabel').textContent = Math.round(worldZoom * 100) + '%';
});

document.getElementById('worldZoomOutBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
  worldZoom = Math.max(worldZoom / 1.25, 0.05);
  applyWorldTransform();
  document.getElementById('worldZoomLabel').textContent = Math.round(worldZoom * 100) + '%';
});

document.getElementById('worldFitBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (placedPages.length === 0) {
    worldZoom = 1.0; worldTx = 0; worldTy = 0;
    applyWorldTransform();
    document.getElementById('worldZoomLabel').textContent = '100%';
    return;
  }
  const worldArea = document.getElementById('world-area');
  const areaW = worldArea.clientWidth;
  const areaH = worldArea.clientHeight;
  let minX = Infinity, minY = Infinity, maxX = -Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;
  placedPages.forEach(p => {
    minX = Math.min(minX, p.x);
    minY = Math.min(minY, p.y);
    maxX = Math.max(maxX, p.x + p.pageW * p.scale);
    maxY = Math.max(maxY, p.y + p.pageH * p.scale);
  });
  const contentW = maxX - minX;
  const contentH = maxY - minY;
  const fitZoom = Math.min(areaW / contentW, areaH / contentH, 4.0) * 0.9;
  worldZoom = fitZoom;
  worldTx = (areaW - contentW * worldZoom) / 2 - minX * worldZoom;
  worldTy = (areaH - contentH * worldZoom) / 2 - minY * worldZoom;
  applyWorldTransform();
  document.getElementById('worldZoomLabel').textContent = Math.round(worldZoom * 100) + '%';
});

// ---- World pan (middle-mouse or drag on empty world area) ----
(function() {
  const worldArea = document.getElementById('world-area');
  worldArea.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
    if (e.target.closest('.placed-page')) return;
    if (e.target.closest('#map-search')) return;
    if (e.target.closest('#page-float-panel')) return;
    if (e.button !== 0 && e.button !== 1) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    worldPanning = true;
    worldPanOriginX = e.clientX;
    worldPanOriginY = e.clientY;
    worldPanStartTx = worldTx;
    worldPanStartTy = worldTy;
    const worldEl = document.getElementById('world');
    if (worldEl) worldEl.classList.add('panning');
  });
  window.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    if (!worldPanning) return;
    worldTx = worldPanStartTx + (e.clientX - worldPanOriginX);
    worldTy = worldPanStartTy + (e.clientY - worldPanOriginY);
    applyWorldTransform();
  });
  window.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
    if (!worldPanning) return;
    worldPanning = false;
    const worldEl = document.getElementById('world');
    if (worldEl) worldEl.classList.remove('panning');
  });
  worldArea.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const rect = worldArea.getBoundingClientRect();
    const focusX = e.clientX - rect.left;
    const focusY = e.clientY - rect.top;
    const delta = e.deltaY < 0 ? 1.15 : 1 / 1.15;
    const newZoom = Math.max(0.05, Math.min(8.0, worldZoom * delta));
    // Zoom toward cursor
    worldTx = focusX - (focusX - worldTx) * (newZoom / worldZoom);
    worldTy = focusY - (focusY - worldTy) * (newZoom / worldZoom);
    worldZoom = newZoom;
    applyWorldTransform();
    document.getElementById('worldZoomLabel').textContent = Math.round(worldZoom * 100) + '%';
  }, { passive: false });

  // Drag-and-drop from repo sidebar
  worldArea.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'copy'; });
  worldArea.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const pageIdx = parseInt(e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain'), 10);
    if (isNaN(pageIdx)) return;
    // Compute drop position in world coords
    const rect = worldArea.getBoundingClientRect();
    const worldDropX = (e.clientX - rect.left - worldTx) / worldZoom;
    const worldDropY = (e.clientY - rect.top  - worldTy) / worldZoom;
    placePage(pageIdx, worldDropX, worldDropY);
  });
})();

// ---- Delegated feat-canvas events (mousedown/mousemove/mouseup/dblclick/click) ----
(function() {
  const worldEl = document.getElementById('world');

  function proxyEvent(e, targetCanvas) {
    // Create a synthetic event aimed at the feat-canvas so existing overlay listeners fire
    // We instead directly call the handler logic via the existing overlay event listeners
    // by temporarily pointing overlay at the active canvas.
    // Since overlay is a let, we rely on the listeners using the closure reference.
    // Events are fired on feat-canvas; listeners are wired per-canvas in placePage().
  }
})();

// ---- buildRepoThumbnails ----
function buildRepoThumbnails() {
  const list = document.getElementById('repoThumbList');
  if (!list) return;
  list.innerHTML = '';
  repoThumbEls = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < nPages; i++) {
    (function(idx) {
      const thumbDiv = document.createElement('div');
      thumbDiv.className = 'repo-thumb';
      thumbDiv.setAttribute('data-page-idx', idx);
      thumbDiv.draggable = true;
      thumbDiv.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => {
        e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', String(idx));
        e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'copy';
      });

      const thumbImg = document.createElement('img');
      thumbImg.src = '/page/' + currentJobId + '/' + idx;
      thumbImg.alt = 'Page ' + (idx + 1);
      thumbImg.style.cssText = 'display:block; width:100%; border-radius:6px;';
      thumbDiv.appendChild(thumbImg);

      const badge = document.createElement('div');
      badge.className = 'page-badge';
      badge.textContent = 'Page ' + (idx + 1);
      thumbDiv.appendChild(badge);

      // Click to place at center of current world viewport
      thumbDiv.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (thumbDiv.classList.contains('placed')) return;
        const worldArea = document.getElementById('world-area');
        const cx = (worldArea.clientWidth  / 2 - worldTx) / worldZoom;
        const cy = (worldArea.clientHeight / 2 - worldTy) / worldZoom;
        placePage(idx, cx, cy);
      });

      list.appendChild(thumbDiv);
      repoThumbEls[idx] = thumbDiv;
    })(i);
  }
}

// ---- placePage ----
function placePage(pageIdx, dropWorldX, dropWorldY) {
  if (placedPages.find(p => p.pageIdx === pageIdx)) return; // already placed

  const worldEl = document.getElementById('world');
  const worldArea = document.getElementById('world-area');

  // Fit-to-display: scale image to fill ~80% of world-area viewport in world units
  const areaW = worldArea.clientWidth;
  const areaH = worldArea.clientHeight;

  // Create placed-page container
  const pageDiv = document.createElement('div');
  pageDiv.className = 'placed-page';
  pageDiv.setAttribute('data-page-idx', pageIdx);

  // Handle bar
  const handle = document.createElement('div');
  handle.className = 'page-handle';
  handle.innerHTML = '<span style="cursor:grab;color:var(--fg);margin-right:6px;letter-spacing:-1px;font-size:16px;opacity:0.7;">\u283F</span><span>Page ' + (pageIdx + 1) + '</span>';

  // On/Off visibility checkbox
  const visWrap = document.createElement('label');
  visWrap.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);user-select:none;margin-left:auto;margin-right:6px;';
  visWrap.addEventListener('click', (e) => e.stopPropagation());
  const visCheck = document.createElement('input');
  visCheck.type = 'checkbox';
  visCheck.checked = true;
  visCheck.style.cssText = 'cursor:pointer;accent-color:var(--accent);width:13px;height:13px;flex-shrink:0;';
  visCheck.addEventListener('change', () => {
    if (visCheck.checked) {
      pageDiv.classList.remove('page-hidden');
    } else {
      pageDiv.classList.add('page-hidden');
    }
  });
  const visLbl = document.createElement('span');
  visLbl.textContent = 'On/Off';
  visWrap.appendChild(visCheck);
  visWrap.appendChild(visLbl);
  handle.appendChild(visWrap);

  const pageBgBtn = document.createElement('button');
  pageBgBtn.className = 'bg-toggle';
  pageBgBtn.title = 'Remove white background from this page';
  pageBgBtn.textContent = '🔲 BG';
  pageBgBtn.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;min-width:auto;padding:2px 6px;margin-right:4px;';
  pageBgBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    const en = placedPages.find(p => p.pageIdx === pageIdx);
    if (!en) return;
    en.transparentBg = !en.transparentBg;
    pageBgBtn.classList.toggle('active', en.transparentBg);
    en.imgEl.src = '/page/' + currentJobId + '/' + pageIdx + '?t=' + Date.now() + (en.transparentBg ? '&transparent=1' : '');
  });
  handle.appendChild(pageBgBtn);

  // Per-page 1in=Nft scale input
  const scaleWrap = document.createElement('span');
  scaleWrap.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;margin-right:4px;';
  scaleWrap.addEventListener('click', e => e.stopPropagation());
  const scaleLbl = document.createElement('span');
  scaleLbl.textContent = '1in=';
  scaleLbl.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);';
  const scaleInp = document.createElement('input');
  scaleInp.type = 'number';
  scaleInp.min = '1';
  scaleInp.max = '10000';
  scaleInp.step = '1';
  scaleInp.placeholder = 'ft';
  scaleInp.style.cssText = 'width:46px;font-size:10px;background:var(--card);color:var(--fg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 4px;';
  scaleInp.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    const en = placedPages.find(p => p.pageIdx === pageIdx);
    if (!en) return;
    const scaleFt = parseFloat(scaleInp.value);
    if (!scaleFt || scaleFt <= 0) { en.scaleInFt = 0; scaleRatio = 0; return; }
    en.scaleInFt = scaleFt;
    scaleRatio = scaleFt;
    if (!leafletMap || !en.pageW || !coordDPI) return;
    const lat = leafletMap.getCenter().lat;
    const metersPerWorldPx = 156543.03392 * Math.cos(lat * Math.PI / 180) / Math.pow(2, WORLD_REF_ZOOM);
    const physWidthInches = en.pageW / (coordDPI * 0.25);
    const realWorldM = physWidthInches * scaleFt * 0.3048;
    const targetWorldPx = realWorldM / metersPerWorldPx;
    const newScale = targetWorldPx / en.pageW;
    en.scale = newScale;
    en.imgEl.style.width  = (en.pageW * newScale) + 'px';
    en.imgEl.style.height = (en.pageH * newScale) + 'px';
    en.canvasEl.style.width  = (en.pageW * newScale) + 'px';
    en.canvasEl.style.height = (en.pageH * newScale) + 'px';
    if (en.rotation) en.applyRotation(en.rotation);
    // sync floating panel
    const fpMapScale = document.getElementById('fpMapScale');
    if (fpMapScale) fpMapScale.value = scaleFt;
  });
  scaleWrap.appendChild(scaleLbl);
  scaleWrap.appendChild(scaleInp);
  handle.appendChild(scaleWrap);

  const returnBtn = document.createElement('button');
  returnBtn.className = 'return-btn';
  returnBtn.textContent = '↩ Return';
  returnBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); returnPage(pageIdx); });
  handle.appendChild(returnBtn);
  pageDiv.appendChild(handle);

  // Image wrap
  const imgWrap = document.createElement('div');
  imgWrap.className = 'page-img-wrap';

  const imgEl = document.createElement('img');
  imgEl.alt = 'Page ' + (pageIdx + 1);
  imgEl.style.display = 'block';
  imgEl.style.transformOrigin = 'center center';
  imgWrap.appendChild(imgEl);

  const featCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  featCanvas.className = 'feat-canvas';
  imgWrap.appendChild(featCanvas);
  pageDiv.appendChild(imgWrap);
  // Click on image area — always activates page for panel; digitizing still needs a layer
  imgWrap.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
    if (activePageIdx === pageIdx) return; // already active
    e.stopPropagation();
    setActivePage(pageIdx);
  });
  // Also activate on handle click (so panel shows when dragging)
  handle.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (e.target === returnBtn) return;
    if (activePageIdx !== pageIdx) setActivePage(pageIdx);
  });

  // Controls strip
  // Create page entry
  const entry = {
    pageIdx,
    el: pageDiv,
    imgEl,
    canvasEl: featCanvas,
    x: 0, y: 0,
    scale: 1.0,
    rotation: 0,
    pageW: 0,
    pageH: 0,
    fitScale: 1.0,
    transparentBg: false,
    scaleInFt: 0,
  };
  placedPages.push(entry);
  entry.scaleInpEl = scaleInp;

  // Position placeholder until image loads
  entry.x = (dropWorldX !== undefined) ? dropWorldX : (areaW / 2 - worldTx) / worldZoom;
  entry.y = (dropWorldY !== undefined) ? dropWorldY : (areaH / 2 - worldTy) / worldZoom;
  pageDiv.style.left = entry.x + 'px';
  pageDiv.style.top  = entry.y + 'px';

  worldEl.appendChild(pageDiv);

  // Load full-res image
  let initialized = false;
  imgEl.onload = function() {
    if (!initialized) {
      initialized = true;
      const natW = imgEl.naturalWidth;
      const natH = imgEl.naturalHeight;

      // Fit-to-display scale: page fills ~80% of viewport in world units
      const fitScaleX = (areaW * 0.8 / worldZoom) / natW;
      const fitScaleY = (areaH * 0.8 / worldZoom) / natH;
      const fitScale = Math.min(fitScaleX, fitScaleY, 1.0);
      entry.fitScale = fitScale;
      entry.scale = fitScale;
      entry.pageW = natW;
      entry.pageH = natH;
      entry.natW = natW;
      entry.natH = natH;

      // Re-center on drop point
      const dispW = natW * fitScale;
      const dispH = natH * fitScale;
      entry.x = entry.x - dispW / 2;
      entry.y = entry.y - dispH / 2;
      pageDiv.style.left = entry.x + 'px';
      pageDiv.style.top  = entry.y + 'px';

      // Apply scale to image
      imgEl.style.width  = (natW * fitScale) + 'px';
      imgEl.style.height = (natH * fitScale) + 'px';

      // Size feat-canvas to natural image pixels
      featCanvas.width  = natW;
      featCanvas.height = natH;
      featCanvas.style.width  = (natW * fitScale) + 'px';
      featCanvas.style.height = (natH * fitScale) + 'px';

      // POST placement to server
      const cx = entry.x + dispW / 2;
      const cy = entry.y + dispH / 2;
      fetch('/place/' + currentJobId + '/' + pageIdx, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ canvas_x: cx, canvas_y: cy, scale: fitScale })
      });

      fetch('/page-transform/' + currentJobId + '/' + pageIdx, {
        method: 'PATCH',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          canvas_x: entry.x,
          canvas_y: entry.y,
          scale: entry.scale,
          rotation: entry.rotation,
          fit_scale: fitScale,
          nat_w: natW,
          nat_h: natH
        })
      });
    }

    if (activePageIdx === pageIdx) updateFloatingPanel(entry);
    if (drawOverlay && activePageIdx === pageIdx) drawOverlay();
  };
  imgEl.src = '/page/' + currentJobId + '/' + pageIdx + '?t=' + Date.now() + (transparentBg ? '&transparent=1' : '');

  // Per-page transform functions — stored on entry so floating panel can call them
  entry.applyRotation = function(deg) {
    entry.rotation = deg;
    imgWrap.style.transform = 'rotate(' + deg + 'deg)';
    imgWrap.style.transformOrigin = 'center center';
    imgEl.style.transform = '';
    featCanvas.style.transform = '';
  };

  entry.applyScale = function(pct) {
    const newScale = (pct / 100) * entry.fitScale;
    entry.scale = newScale;
    imgEl.style.width  = (entry.pageW * newScale) + 'px';
    imgEl.style.height = (entry.pageH * newScale) + 'px';
    featCanvas.style.width  = (entry.pageW * newScale) + 'px';
    featCanvas.style.height = (entry.pageH * newScale) + 'px';
    if (entry.rotation) entry.applyRotation(entry.rotation);
  };

  entry.applyOpacity = function(pct) {
    entry.opacity = pct;
    imgEl.style.opacity = pct / 100;
    featCanvas.style.opacity = pct / 100;
  };
  entry.opacity = 100;

  // Per-page drag (move placed-page on world canvas)
  handle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
    if (e.target === returnBtn) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    const startX = e.clientX;
    const startY = e.clientY;
    const startLeft = entry.x;
    const startTop  = entry.y;
    function onMove(ev) {
      entry.x = startLeft + (ev.clientX - startX) / worldZoom;
      entry.y = startTop  + (ev.clientY - startY) / worldZoom;
      pageDiv.style.left = entry.x + 'px';
      pageDiv.style.top  = entry.y + 'px';
    }
    function onUp() {
      window.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
      window.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
      fetch('/page-transform/' + currentJobId + '/' + pageIdx, {
        method: 'PATCH',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          canvas_x: entry.x,
          canvas_y: entry.y,
          scale: entry.scale,
          rotation: entry.rotation,
          fit_scale: entry.fitScale,
          nat_w: entry.natW,
          nat_h: entry.natH
        })
      });
    }
    window.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
    window.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
  });

  // feat-canvas is visual-only; digitizing events are handled by #world-overlay.

  // Mark repo thumb as placed
  if (repoThumbEls[pageIdx]) repoThumbEls[pageIdx].classList.add('placed');
  // Auto-activate so floating panel appears immediately
  setActivePage(pageIdx);
}

// ---- setActivePage ----
async function setActivePage(pageIdx) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.placed-page').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
  activePageIdx = pageIdx;
  currentPage = pageIdx;
  const entry = placedPages.find(p => p.pageIdx === pageIdx);
  if (!entry) { updateFloatingPanel(null); return; }
  entry.el.classList.add('active');
  updateFloatingPanel(entry);
  await fetchFeaturesForPage();
  drawOverlay();
}

// ---- returnPage ----
function returnPage(pageIdx) {
  const entry = placedPages.find(p => p.pageIdx === pageIdx);
  if (!entry) return;
  entry.el.parentNode && entry.el.parentNode.removeChild(entry.el);
  placedPages = placedPages.filter(p => p.pageIdx !== pageIdx);
  if (repoThumbEls[pageIdx]) repoThumbEls[pageIdx].classList.remove('placed');
  if (activePageIdx === pageIdx) {
    activePageIdx = -1;
    currentPage = -1;
    updateFloatingPanel(null);
  }
  fetch('/place/' + currentJobId + '/' + pageIdx, { method: 'DELETE' });
}

function getActiveEntry() { return placedPages.find(p => p.pageIdx === activePageIdx); }

function updateFloatingPanel(entry) {
  const panel = document.getElementById('page-float-panel');
  if (!panel) return;
  if (!entry) { panel.classList.add('hidden'); return; }
  panel.classList.remove('hidden');
  document.getElementById('fpLabel').textContent = 'Page ' + (entry.pageIdx + 1);
  const rotS = document.getElementById('fpRotSlider'), rotN = document.getElementById('fpRotNum');
  const scaleS = document.getElementById('fpScaleSlider'), scaleN = document.getElementById('fpScaleNum');
  const opacS = document.getElementById('fpOpacSlider'),  opacN = document.getElementById('fpOpacNum');
  rotS.value = entry.rotation || 0; rotN.value = entry.rotation || 0;
  const scalePct = Math.round((entry.scale / entry.fitScale) * 100);
  scaleS.value = scalePct; if(scaleN) scaleN.value = scalePct;
  const opacPct = entry.opacity || 100;
  opacS.value = opacPct; if(opacN) opacN.value = opacPct;
  const fpMapScale = document.getElementById('fpMapScale');
  if (fpMapScale) fpMapScale.value = entry.scaleInFt || '';
  scaleRatio = entry.scaleInFt || 0;
}

function fpSnap(deg) {
  const e = getActiveEntry();
  if (!e || !e.applyRotation) return;
  document.getElementById('fpRotSlider').value = deg;
  document.getElementById('fpRotNum').value = deg;
  e.applyRotation(deg);
  fetch('/rotation/' + currentJobId + '/' + e.pageIdx, { method:'PATCH', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify({rotation:deg}) });
}

function fpStartDigitize() {
  if (activePageIdx < 0) return;
  digitizing = true;
  selectMode = false;
  const woEl2 = document.getElementById('world-overlay');
  if (woEl2) woEl2.classList.remove('select-active');
  const selBtnX = document.getElementById('fpSelectBtn');
  if (selBtnX) selBtnX.classList.remove('active');
  const woEl = document.getElementById('world-overlay');
  if (woEl && activeLayerId) woEl.classList.add('digitize-active');
  document.getElementById('fpStartBtn').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('fpStopBtn').style.display = '';
  const selBtn = document.getElementById('fpSelectBtn');
  if (selBtn) { selBtn.disabled = true; selBtn.style.opacity = '0.4'; selBtn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed'; }
  updateDigitizeStatus();
}
function fpStopDigitize() {
  digitizing = false;
  selectMode = false;
  const woEl2 = document.getElementById('world-overlay');
  if (woEl2) { woEl2.classList.remove('select-active'); woEl2.classList.remove('digitize-active'); }
  drawingVertices = []; isDrawing = false; mousePos = null;
  document.getElementById('fpStartBtn').style.display = '';
  document.getElementById('fpStopBtn').style.display = 'none';
  const selBtn = document.getElementById('fpSelectBtn');
  if (selBtn) { selBtn.disabled = false; selBtn.style.opacity = ''; selBtn.style.cursor = ''; }
  if (typeof drawOverlay === 'function') drawOverlay();
  updateDigitizeStatus();
}
function fpSelectMode() {
  selectMode = !selectMode;
  const woEl = document.getElementById('world-overlay');
  if (woEl) woEl.classList.toggle('select-active', selectMode);
  const btn = document.getElementById('fpSelectBtn');
  if (btn) btn.classList.toggle('active', selectMode);
}

function toggleBg() {
  // Legacy: toggle all placed pages at once
  placedPages.forEach(entry => {
    entry.transparentBg = !entry.transparentBg;
    entry.imgEl.src = '/page/' + currentJobId + '/' + entry.pageIdx + '?t=' + Date.now() + (entry.transparentBg ? '&transparent=1' : '');
  });
}

// Wire floating panel sliders
(function(){
  function ae() { return getActiveEntry(); }
  const fpRot=document.getElementById('fpRotSlider'), fpRotN=document.getElementById('fpRotNum');
  const fpScale=document.getElementById('fpScaleSlider'), fpScaleN=document.getElementById('fpScaleNum');
  const fpOpac=document.getElementById('fpOpacSlider'),  fpOpacN=document.getElementById('fpOpacNum');
  if(!fpRot) return;

  // Rotation
  fpRot.addEventListener('input',()=>{const e=ae();if(e){e.applyRotation(parseFloat(fpRot.value));fpRotN.value=fpRot.value;}});
  fpRot.addEventListener('change',()=>{const e=ae();if(e)fetch('/rotation/'+currentJobId+'/'+e.pageIdx,{method:'PATCH',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({rotation:parseFloat(fpRot.value)})});});
  fpRotN.addEventListener('input',()=>{const e=ae();if(e){e.applyRotation(parseFloat(fpRotN.value)||0);fpRot.value=fpRotN.value;}});
  fpRotN.addEventListener('change',()=>{const e=ae();if(e)fetch('/rotation/'+currentJobId+'/'+e.pageIdx,{method:'PATCH',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({rotation:parseFloat(fpRotN.value)||0})});});

  // Scale (slider ↔ number input)
  fpScale.addEventListener('input',()=>{const e=ae();if(e){e.applyScale(parseInt(fpScale.value));if(fpScaleN)fpScaleN.value=fpScale.value;}});
  fpScale.addEventListener('change',()=>{const e=ae();if(e)fetch('/page-transform/'+currentJobId+'/'+e.pageIdx,{method:'PATCH',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({scale:e.scale,rotation:e.rotation,canvas_x:e.x+e.pageW*e.scale/2,canvas_y:e.y+e.pageH*e.scale/2,fit_scale:e.fitScale,nat_w:e.natW,nat_h:e.natH})});});
  if(fpScaleN){fpScaleN.addEventListener('input',()=>{const e=ae();const v=Math.min(400,Math.max(25,parseInt(fpScaleN.value)||100));if(e){e.applyScale(v);fpScale.value=v;}});fpScaleN.addEventListener('change',()=>{const e=ae();if(e)fetch('/page-transform/'+currentJobId+'/'+e.pageIdx,{method:'PATCH',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({scale:e.scale,rotation:e.rotation,canvas_x:e.x+e.pageW*e.scale/2,canvas_y:e.y+e.pageH*e.scale/2,fit_scale:e.fitScale,nat_w:e.natW,nat_h:e.natH})});});}

  // Opacity (slider ↔ number input)
  fpOpac.addEventListener('input',()=>{const e=ae();if(e){e.applyOpacity(parseInt(fpOpac.value));if(fpOpacN)fpOpacN.value=fpOpac.value;}});
  if(fpOpacN){fpOpacN.addEventListener('input',()=>{const e=ae();const v=Math.min(100,Math.max(5,parseInt(fpOpacN.value)||100));if(e){e.applyOpacity(v);fpOpac.value=v;}});}

  // Map scale: 1in = N ft → resize page to real-world dimensions
  const fpMapScale = document.getElementById('fpMapScale');
  if(fpMapScale){
    fpMapScale.addEventListener('change', () => {
      const e = ae();
      const scaleFt = parseFloat(fpMapScale.value);
      if (!e || !scaleFt || scaleFt <= 0 || !leafletMap || !e.pageW || !coordDPI) return;
      const lat = leafletMap.getCenter().lat;
      const metersPerWorldPx = 156543.03392 * Math.cos(lat * Math.PI / 180) / Math.pow(2, WORLD_REF_ZOOM);
      const physWidthInches = e.pageW / (coordDPI * 0.25);
      const realWorldM = physWidthInches * scaleFt * 0.3048;
      const targetWorldPx = realWorldM / metersPerWorldPx;
      const newScale = targetWorldPx / e.pageW;
      e.scale = newScale;
      e.scaleInFt = scaleFt;
      scaleRatio = scaleFt;
      e.imgEl.style.width  = (e.pageW * newScale) + 'px';
      e.imgEl.style.height = (e.pageH * newScale) + 'px';
      e.canvasEl.style.width  = (e.pageW * newScale) + 'px';
      e.canvasEl.style.height = (e.pageH * newScale) + 'px';
      if (e.rotation) e.applyRotation(e.rotation);
      if (e.scaleInpEl) e.scaleInpEl.value = scaleFt;
      const pct = Math.round((newScale / e.fitScale) * 100);
      fpScale.value = Math.min(400, Math.max(25, pct));
      if (fpScaleN) fpScaleN.value = fpScale.value;
    });
  }
})();

// Deselect all pages (keeps them on map, clears active selection)
function deselectAllPages() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.placed-page').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
  activePageIdx = -1;
  currentPage = -1;
  digitizing = false;
  selectMode = false;
  const wo = document.getElementById('world-overlay');
  if (wo) { wo.classList.remove('digitize-active'); wo.classList.remove('select-active'); }
  updateFloatingPanel(null);
  updateDigitizeStatus();
}

function initLeafletMap() {
  try {
    const mapEl = document.getElementById('world-basemap');
    const wrapEl = document.getElementById('world-basemap-wrap');
    if (!mapEl) { console.warn('[DrawBridge] Leaflet init: mapEl missing'); return; }
    if (!WORLD_REF_LATLNG) { console.warn('[DrawBridge] Leaflet init: L not ready'); return; }
    if (leafletMap) return;
    if (wrapEl) { wrapEl.style.width = '100%'; wrapEl.style.height = '100%'; }
    leafletMap = L.map(mapEl, {
      center: WORLD_REF_LATLNG,
      zoom: WORLD_REF_ZOOM,
      zoomSnap: 0,
      zoomControl: false,
      attributionControl: true,
      dragging: false,
      touchZoom: false,
      scrollWheelZoom: false,
      doubleClickZoom: false,
      boxZoom: false,
      keyboard: false,
    });
    osmTileLayer = L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
      attribution: '&copy; <a href="https://osm.org/copyright">OpenStreetMap</a> contributors',
      maxZoom: 22,
    });
    satTileLayer = L.tileLayer('https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}', {
      attribution: 'Esri World Imagery',
      maxZoom: 22,
    });
    osmTileLayer.addTo(leafletMap);
    setTimeout(() => { if (leafletMap) { leafletMap.invalidateSize(); updateMapView(); } }, 100);
    setTimeout(() => { if (leafletMap) { leafletMap.invalidateSize(); updateMapView(); } }, 500);
    setTimeout(() => geolocateUser(), 600);
  } catch (e) {
    console.error('[DrawBridge] Leaflet init failed:', e);
  }
}

function updateMapView() {
  if (!leafletMap || !WORLD_REF_LATLNG) return;
  const worldArea = document.getElementById('world-area');
  if (!worldArea) return;
  const W = worldArea.clientWidth || 800;
  const H = worldArea.clientHeight || 600;
  const cx = (W / 2 - worldTx) / worldZoom;
  const cy = (H / 2 - worldTy) / worldZoom;
  const refPx = leafletMap.project(WORLD_REF_LATLNG, WORLD_REF_ZOOM);
  const centerLL = leafletMap.unproject(L.point(refPx.x + cx, refPx.y + cy), WORLD_REF_ZOOM);
  const lZoom = WORLD_REF_ZOOM + Math.log2(Math.max(worldZoom, 0.01));
  leafletMap.setView(centerLL, lZoom, { animate: false });
}

function toggleBasemap() {
  if (!leafletMap || !osmTileLayer || !satTileLayer) return;
  const btn = document.getElementById('basemapToggleBtn');
  if (currentBasemap === 'osm') {
    leafletMap.removeLayer(osmTileLayer);
    satTileLayer.addTo(leafletMap);
    currentBasemap = 'sat';
  } else {
    leafletMap.removeLayer(satTileLayer);
    osmTileLayer.addTo(leafletMap);
    currentBasemap = 'osm';
  }
}

// Geolocate user and pan basemap to their location
async function geolocateUser() {
  if (!leafletMap || !WORLD_REF_LATLNG) return;

  function applyLocation(lat, lon, label) {
    try {
      WORLD_REF_LATLNG = L.latLng(lat, lon);
      worldTx = 0; worldTy = 0;
      updateMapView();
      applyWorldTransform();
      document.getElementById('worldZoomLabel').textContent = Math.round(worldZoom * 100) + '%';
      console.log('[DrawBridge] Map anchored to', label, lat, lon);
    } catch(e) { console.warn('[DrawBridge] applyLocation error:', e); }
  }

  // 1. Try browser geolocation (permission prompt)
  if (navigator.geolocation) {
    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
      (pos) => applyLocation(pos.coords.latitude, pos.coords.longitude, 'browser GPS'),
      async () => {
        // 2. Fall back to IP geolocation (silent, state-level)
        try {
          const r = await fetch('https://ipapi.co/json/');
          const d = await r.json();
          if (d.latitude && d.longitude) applyLocation(d.latitude, d.longitude, 'IP (' + (d.city || d.region) + ')');
        } catch(e) { console.log('[DrawBridge] IP geo failed, staying at default'); }
      },
      { timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 300000 }
    );
  } else {
    // No browser geo — try IP directly
    try {
      const r = await fetch('https://ipapi.co/json/');
      const d = await r.json();
      if (d.latitude && d.longitude) applyLocation(d.latitude, d.longitude, 'IP (' + (d.city || d.region) + ')');
    } catch(e) { console.log('[DrawBridge] IP geo failed, staying at default'); }
  }
}

// Init on load; also re-init on window load in case CDN was async
try { initLeafletMap(); } catch(e) { console.error('[DrawBridge] Leaflet init error:', e); }
window.addEventListener('load', () => {
  try { initLeafletMap(); } catch(e) { console.error('[DrawBridge] Leaflet init error:', e); }
  loadSessionPanel();
});

async function geocodeSearch(query) {
  if (!query || !query.trim() || !leafletMap) return;
  const btn = document.getElementById('mapSearchBtn');
  btn.textContent = '\u2026';
  btn.disabled = true;
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(
      'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?q=' + encodeURIComponent(query.trim()) + '&format=json&limit=1',
      { headers: { 'Accept-Language': 'en' } }
    );
    const data = await resp.json();
    if (!data || !data.length) {
      btn.textContent = '\u2715';
      setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = '&#128269;'; btn.disabled = false; }, 1500);
      return;
    }
    const lat = parseFloat(data[0].lat);
    const lon = parseFloat(data[0].lon);
    const worldArea = document.getElementById('world-area');
    const W = worldArea ? worldArea.clientWidth : 800;
    const H = worldArea ? worldArea.clientHeight : 600;
    const refPx = leafletMap.project(WORLD_REF_LATLNG, WORLD_REF_ZOOM);
    const targetPx = leafletMap.project(L.latLng(lat, lon), WORLD_REF_ZOOM);
    worldTx = W / 2 - (targetPx.x - refPx.x) * worldZoom;
    worldTy = H / 2 - (targetPx.y - refPx.y) * worldZoom;
    applyWorldTransform();
    btn.textContent = '\u2713';
    setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = '&#128269;'; btn.disabled = false; }, 1500);
  } catch (err) {
    btn.textContent = '\u2715';
    setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = '&#128269;'; btn.disabled = false; }, 1500);
  }
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Geocode autocomplete
(function() {
  let _gcTimer = null;
  const input = document.getElementById('mapSearchInput');
  const dd    = document.getElementById('geocode-dropdown');
  if (!input || !dd) return;

  input.addEventListener('input', function() {
    clearTimeout(_gcTimer);
    const q = this.value.trim();
    if (!q || q.length < 3) { dd.innerHTML = ''; dd.style.display = 'none'; return; }
    _gcTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
      try {
        const r = await fetch(
          'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?q=' + encodeURIComponent(q) + '&format=json&limit=5',
          { headers: { 'Accept-Language': 'en' } }
        );
        const data = await r.json();
        if (!data || !data.length) { dd.innerHTML = ''; dd.style.display = 'none'; return; }
        dd.innerHTML = data.map(item =>
          '<div class="gc-item" data-name="' + item.display_name.replace(/"/g, '&quot;') + '">' + item.display_name + '</div>'
        ).join('');
        dd.style.display = 'block';
        dd.querySelectorAll('.gc-item').forEach(el => {
          el.addEventListener('click', () => {
            input.value = el.dataset.name;
            dd.style.display = 'none';
            geocodeSearch(el.dataset.name);
          });
        });
      } catch(e) { dd.innerHTML = ''; dd.style.display = 'none'; }
    }, 300);
  });

  document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (!dd.contains(e.target) && e.target !== input) {
      dd.style.display = 'none';
    }
  });
})();

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Auth UI
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
let _authMode = 'login';

function authShowTab(mode) {
  _authMode = mode;
  const isLogin = mode === 'login';
  document.getElementById('authSubmitBtn').textContent = isLogin ? 'Sign In' : 'Create Account';
  document.getElementById('authTabLogin').style.cssText = isLogin ? '' : 'background:transparent;border-color:var(--muted);color:var(--muted);';
  document.getElementById('authTabRegister').style.cssText = isLogin ? 'background:transparent;border-color:var(--muted);color:var(--muted);' : '';
  document.getElementById('authError').style.display = 'none';
}

async function authSubmit() {
  const email    = document.getElementById('authEmail').value.trim();
  const password = document.getElementById('authPassword').value;
  const errEl    = document.getElementById('authError');
  errEl.style.display = 'none';
  const endpoint = _authMode === 'login' ? '/api/login' : '/api/register';
  try {
    const res  = await fetch(endpoint, { method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({email, password}) });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (!data.ok) {
      errEl.textContent = data.error || 'Something went wrong';
      errEl.style.display = 'block';
      return;
    }
    document.getElementById('authModal').classList.remove('open');
    updateAuthUI(data.email);
  } catch(e) {
    errEl.textContent = 'Network error';
    errEl.style.display = 'block';
  }
}

function updateAuthUI(email) {
  // Sidebar account card
  const loggedOut = document.getElementById('accountLoggedOut');
  const loggedIn  = document.getElementById('accountLoggedIn');
  const emailEl   = document.getElementById('accountEmail');
  const balEl     = document.getElementById('accountBalance');
  // Header account widget
  const hdrOut    = document.getElementById('headerLoggedOut');
  const hdrIn     = document.getElementById('headerLoggedIn');
  const hdrEmail  = document.getElementById('headerEmail');
  const hdrBal    = document.getElementById('headerBalance');

  if (email) {
    if (loggedOut) loggedOut.style.display = 'none';
    if (loggedIn)  loggedIn.style.display  = 'flex';
    if (emailEl)   emailEl.textContent = email;
    if (hdrOut)    hdrOut.style.display = 'none';
    if (hdrIn)   { hdrIn.style.display = 'flex'; }
    if (hdrEmail)  hdrEmail.textContent = email;

    fetch('/api/credits').then(r => r.json()).then(d => {
      const b = (d && d.ok) ? (parseInt(d.balance || 0, 10) || 0) : 0;
      const label = b > 0 ? b + ' pages remaining' : 'No credits';
      if (balEl)  balEl.textContent  = label;
      if (hdrBal) hdrBal.textContent = label;
    }).catch(() => {
      if (balEl)  balEl.textContent  = '';
      if (hdrBal) hdrBal.textContent = '';
    });
  } else {
    if (loggedOut) loggedOut.style.display = 'flex';
    if (loggedIn)  loggedIn.style.display  = 'none';
    if (emailEl)   emailEl.textContent = '';
    if (balEl)     balEl.textContent = '';
    if (hdrOut)    hdrOut.style.display = 'block';
    if (hdrIn)     hdrIn.style.display  = 'none';
    if (hdrEmail)  hdrEmail.textContent = '';
    if (hdrBal)    hdrBal.textContent = '';
  }
}

async function checkAuthState() {
  try {
    const res  = await fetch('/api/me');
    const data = await res.json();
    updateAuthUI(data.ok ? data.email : null);
  } catch(e) { /* no-op */ }
}

function openAuthModal() {
  authShowTab('login');
  document.getElementById('authEmail').value    = '';
  document.getElementById('authPassword').value = '';
  document.getElementById('authModal').classList.add('open');
}

async function doLogout() {
  await fetch('/api/logout', { method: 'POST' });
  updateAuthUI(null);
}

document.getElementById('openAuthBtnHeader').addEventListener('click', openAuthModal);
document.getElementById('logoutBtnHeader').addEventListener('click', doLogout);

// Enter key submits auth form
['authEmail','authPassword'].forEach(id => {
  document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') authSubmit(); });
});

// Buy Credits
document.getElementById('buyCreditsBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
  document.getElementById('creditsPackError').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('creditsModal').classList.add('open');
});

document.querySelectorAll('.pack-btn').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const pack = btn.dataset.pack;
    const errEl = document.getElementById('creditsPackError');
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.textContent = 'Redirecting...';
    try {
      const res  = await fetch('/api/buy-credits', { method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({pack}) });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!data.ok) { errEl.textContent = data.error || 'Error'; errEl.style.display = 'block'; btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = btn.dataset.label || pack; return; }
      window.location.href = data.checkout_url;
    } catch(e) { errEl.textContent = 'Network error'; errEl.style.display = 'block'; btn.disabled = false; }
  });
});

// Handle payment return
(function() {
  const p = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  if (p.get('payment') === 'success') {
    history.replaceState({}, '', '/');
    const t = document.createElement('div');
    t.textContent = '✅ Payment successful! Credits added to your account.';
    t.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:20px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#1a3a1a;color:#00e676;border:1px solid #00e676;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 20px;font-size:13px;z-index:9999;';
    document.body.appendChild(t);
    setTimeout(() => t.remove(), 5000);
  }
  if (p.get('export_paid') === '1') {
    const paidJobId = p.get('job_id');
    history.replaceState({}, '', '/');
    if (paidJobId) {
      const toast = document.createElement('div');
      toast.textContent = '✅ Payment received! Preparing your export...';
      toast.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:20px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#1a3a1a;color:#00e676;border:1px solid #00e676;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 20px;font-size:13px;z-index:9999;';
      document.body.appendChild(toast);
      setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 6000);
      // Poll for export auth then auto-trigger export
      let attempts = 0;
      const poll = setInterval(async () => {
        attempts++;
        if (attempts > 15) { clearInterval(poll); return; }
        try {
          const res = await fetch(`/api/export-status/${paidJobId}`);
          const d = await res.json();
          if (d.paid && d.token) {
            clearInterval(poll);
            currentJobId = paidJobId;
            const fmt = (document.getElementById('exportFormat') || {}).value || 'gdb';
            const exres = await fetch(`/export/${paidJobId}`, {
              method: 'POST',
              headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'},
              body: JSON.stringify({format: fmt, export_token: d.token, ref_lat: null, ref_lon: null})
            });
            const exdata = await exres.json();
            if (exres.ok) {
              const pollTimer2 = setInterval(async () => {
                const sres = await fetch(`/status/${paidJobId}`);
                const sdata = await sres.json();
                if (sdata.status === 'done' || sdata.status === 'ready') {
                  clearInterval(pollTimer2);
                  window.location.href = `/download/${paidJobId}`;
                } else if (sdata.status === 'error') { clearInterval(pollTimer2); alert('Export failed.'); }
              }, 2000);
            } else { alert(exdata.error || 'Export failed after payment.'); }
          }
        } catch(e) {}
      }, 2000);
    }
  }
})();

// Check auth state on load
checkAuthState();
</script>

</body>
</html>
"""


def add_log(job_id, message):
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return
        job["log"].append(message)


def set_progress(job_id, value):
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return
        job["progress"] = float(value)


def cleanup_job(job_id):
    try:
        job_dir = os.path.join(BASE_TMP, job_id)
        if os.path.isdir(job_dir):
            shutil.rmtree(job_dir, ignore_errors=True)
    except Exception:
        pass


def run_job(job_id, pdf_path, opts):
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        JOBS[job_id]["status"] = "rendering"
        JOBS[job_id]["progress"] = 0.0

    try:
        out_dir = os.path.join(BASE_TMP, job_id)
        os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True)

        def status_cb(msg):
            add_log(job_id, msg)

        def progress_cb(p):
            set_progress(job_id, p)

        add_log(job_id, f"Started: {datetime.now().isoformat()}")

        raw_paths, display_paths = prepare_job(
            pdf_path,
            out_dir,
            dpi=opts["dpi"],
            status_cb=status_cb,
            progress_cb=progress_cb,
        )

        n_pages = len(raw_paths)
        add_log(job_id, f"Rendered {n_pages} page(s). Ready to digitize.")

        with JOBS_LOCK:
            JOBS[job_id]["opts"] = opts
            JOBS[job_id]["raw_paths"] = raw_paths
            JOBS[job_id]["display_paths"] = display_paths
            JOBS[job_id]["n_pages"] = n_pages
            JOBS[job_id]["page_sizes"] = [Image.open(p).size for p in raw_paths]
            JOBS[job_id]["page_rotations"] = [0.0] * n_pages
            JOBS[job_id]["placed_pages"] = [
                {"page_idx": i, "canvas_x": 0.0, "canvas_y": 0.0, "rotation": 0.0, "scale": 1.0, "placed": False}
                for i in range(n_pages)
            ]
            JOBS[job_id]["status"] = "ready"

        _db_save_job(job_id, JOBS.get(job_id, {}))

        t = threading.Timer(3600, cleanup_job, args=[job_id])
        t.daemon = True
        t.start()

    except Exception:
        tb = traceback.format_exc()
        for line in tb.splitlines():
            add_log(job_id, line)
        with JOBS_LOCK:
            JOBS[job_id]["status"] = "error"
            JOBS[job_id]["progress"] = 1.0
            _db_save_job(job_id, JOBS.get(job_id, {}))


@app.route("/")
def index():
    return HTML.replace('{VERSION}', VERSION)


@app.route("/process", methods=["POST"])
def process():
    if "pdf" not in request.files:
        return jsonify({"error": "missing pdf"}), 400

    if request.content_length and request.content_length > 200 * 1024 * 1024:
        return jsonify({"error": "PDF too large (max 200 MB). Use a lower DPI or split into smaller files."}), 400

    pdf = request.files["pdf"]
    if not pdf.filename:
        return jsonify({"error": "empty filename"}), 400

    job_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    job_dir = os.path.join(BASE_TMP, job_id)
    os.makedirs(job_dir, exist_ok=True)

    pdf_path = os.path.join(job_dir, pdf.filename)
    pdf.save(pdf_path)

    try:
        if os.path.getsize(pdf_path) > 200 * 1024 * 1024:
            try:
                os.remove(pdf_path)
            except Exception:
                pass
            return jsonify({"error": "PDF too large (max 200 MB). Use a lower DPI or split into smaller files."}), 400
    except Exception:
        pass

    raw_name = request.form.get("output_name", "").strip()
    safe_name = "".join(c for c in raw_name if c.isalnum() or c in " _-.()")
    if not safe_name:
        safe_name = os.path.splitext(pdf.filename)[0]

    opts = {
        "dpi": int(request.form.get("dpi", 300)),
        "output_name": safe_name,
    }

    with JOBS_LOCK:
        JOBS[job_id] = {
            "status": "queued",
            "log": [],
            "progress": 0.0,
            "output_path": "",
            "base": os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(pdf.filename))[0],
            "out_dir": job_dir,
            "raw_paths": [],
            "display_paths": [],
            "lines": [],
            "text_items": [],
            "labels": [],
            "opts": opts,
            "n_pages": 0,
        }

    thread = threading.Thread(target=run_job, args=(job_id, pdf_path, opts), daemon=True)
    thread.start()

    return jsonify({"job_id": job_id})


@app.route("/status/<job_id>")
def status(job_id):
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        return jsonify({
            "status": job.get("status"),
            "log": job.get("log", []),
            "progress": job.get("progress", 0.0),
            "output_path": job.get("output_path", ""),
            "n_pages": job.get("n_pages", 0),
        })


@app.route("/page/<job_id>/<int:page_idx>")
def page(job_id, page_idx):
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        paths = job.get("display_paths") or []
    if page_idx < 0 or page_idx >= len(paths):
        return jsonify({"error": "not ready"}), 404
    path = paths[page_idx]
    if not os.path.isfile(path):
        return jsonify({"error": "missing file"}), 404
    if request.args.get("transparent") == "1":
        try:
            png_path = make_transparent_png(path)
            return send_file(png_path, mimetype="image/png")
        except Exception:
            pass  # fall through to JPEG on error
    return send_file(path, mimetype="image/jpeg")


@app.route("/layer/<job_id>", methods=["POST"])
def create_layer(job_id):
    payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
    name = str(payload.get("name", "Unnamed Layer")).strip() or "Unnamed Layer"
    geometry_type = str(payload.get("geometry_type", "point")).lower()
    if geometry_type not in ("point", "line", "polygon"):
        return jsonify({"error": "invalid geometry_type"}), 400

    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        label_id = 1
        if job.get("labels"):
            label_id = max(int(l.get("label_id", 0)) for l in job["labels"]) + 1
        layer = {
            "label_id": label_id,
            "name": name,
            "geometry_type": geometry_type,
            "features": [],
            "next_feature_id": 1,
        }
        job["labels"].append(layer)

    return jsonify({"ok": True, "label_id": label_id})


@app.route("/layer/<job_id>/<int:label_id>", methods=["DELETE"])
def delete_layer(job_id, label_id):
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        job["labels"] = [l for l in job.get("labels", []) if int(l.get("label_id")) != int(label_id)]
    return jsonify({"ok": True})


@app.route("/layer/<job_id>/<int:label_id>", methods=["PATCH"])
def rename_layer(job_id, label_id):
    payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
    new_name = (payload.get("name") or "").strip()
    if not new_name:
        return jsonify({"error": "name required"}), 400
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        label = next((l for l in job.get("labels", []) if int(l.get("label_id")) == int(label_id)), None)
        if not label:
            return jsonify({"error": "label not found"}), 404
        label["name"] = new_name
    return jsonify({"ok": True})


@app.route("/feature/<job_id>/<int:label_id>", methods=["POST"])
def add_feature(job_id, label_id):
    payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
    page = int(payload.get("page", 0))
    coords = payload.get("coords")
    coord_space = payload.get("coord_space", "page")  # 'world' or 'page'

    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        labels = job.get("labels") or []
        label = next((l for l in labels if int(l.get("label_id")) == int(label_id)), None)
        if not label:
            return jsonify({"error": "label not found"}), 404

        if coord_space == "world":
            # World-canvas coords stored as-is (no pixel scaling needed)
            if label["geometry_type"] == "point":
                if not isinstance(coords, (list, tuple)) or len(coords) != 2:
                    return jsonify({"error": "invalid coords"}), 400
                full_coords = [float(coords[0]), float(coords[1])]
            else:
                if not isinstance(coords, (list, tuple)) or len(coords) < 2:
                    return jsonify({"error": "invalid coords"}), 400
                full_coords = [[float(c[0]), float(c[1])] for c in coords]
        else:
            scale = 1.0 / DISPLAY_SCALE
            if label["geometry_type"] == "point":
                if not isinstance(coords, (list, tuple)) or len(coords) != 2:
                    return jsonify({"error": "invalid coords"}), 400
                full_coords = [coords[0] * scale, coords[1] * scale]
            else:
                if not isinstance(coords, (list, tuple)) or len(coords) < 2:
                    return jsonify({"error": "invalid coords"}), 400
                full_coords = [[c[0] * scale, c[1] * scale] for c in coords]

        feat_id = int(label.get("next_feature_id", 1))
        label["next_feature_id"] = feat_id + 1
        label["features"].append({
            "id": feat_id, "page": page,
            "coords": full_coords, "coord_space": coord_space,
            "label": str(payload.get("label", ""))
        })
        count = len(label["features"])

    return jsonify({"ok": True, "feature_id": feat_id, "count": count})


@app.route("/feature/<job_id>/<int:label_id>/<int:feature_id>", methods=["DELETE"])
def delete_feature(job_id, label_id, feature_id):
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        labels = job.get("labels") or []
        label = next((l for l in labels if int(l.get("label_id")) == int(label_id)), None)
        if not label:
            return jsonify({"error": "label not found"}), 404
        before = len(label["features"])
        label["features"] = [f for f in label.get("features", []) if int(f.get("id")) != int(feature_id)]
        count = len(label["features"])

    return jsonify({"ok": True, "count": count})


@app.route("/feature/<job_id>/<int:label_id>/<int:feature_id>/label", methods=["PATCH"])
def update_feature_label(job_id, label_id, feature_id):
    payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
    new_label = str(payload.get("label", "")).strip()
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        labels = job.get("labels") or []
        label = next((l for l in labels if int(l.get("label_id")) == int(label_id)), None)
        if not label:
            return jsonify({"error": "label not found"}), 404
        feat = next((f for f in label.get("features", []) if int(f["id"]) == int(feature_id)), None)
        if not feat:
            return jsonify({"error": "feature not found"}), 404
        feat["label"] = new_label
    return jsonify({"ok": True})


@app.route("/features/<job_id>/<int:page_idx>")
def features(job_id, page_idx):
    out_layers = []
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        labels = job.get("labels") or []
        for label in labels:
            feats = []
            for f in label.get("features", []):
                if int(f.get("page", -1)) != int(page_idx):
                    continue
                if label["geometry_type"] == "point":
                    x, y = f["coords"]
                    feats.append({"id": f["id"], "page": f["page"], "coords": [x * DISPLAY_SCALE, y * DISPLAY_SCALE], "label": f.get("label", "")})
                else:
                    coords = [[c[0] * DISPLAY_SCALE, c[1] * DISPLAY_SCALE] for c in f["coords"]]
                    feats.append({"id": f["id"], "page": f["page"], "coords": coords, "label": f.get("label", "")})
            out_layers.append({
                "label_id": label["label_id"],
                "name": label["name"],
                "geometry_type": label["geometry_type"],
                "features": feats,
            })

    return jsonify({"layers": out_layers, "dpi": job.get("dpi", 300)})


@app.route("/features/<job_id>/all")
def features_all(job_id):
    """Return all features across all pages, coords in their stored space (world or page)."""
    out_layers = []
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        labels = job.get("labels") or []
        for label in labels:
            feats = []
            for f in label.get("features", []):
                cs = f.get("coord_space", "page")
                if cs == "world":
                    # World coords stored as-is, return as-is
                    feats.append({"id": f["id"], "page": f["page"], "coords": f["coords"], "label": f.get("label", "")})
                else:
                    # Legacy page-local pixel coords — scale back to display
                    if label["geometry_type"] == "point":
                        x, y = f["coords"]
                        feats.append({"id": f["id"], "page": f["page"],
                                      "coords": [x * DISPLAY_SCALE, y * DISPLAY_SCALE], "label": f.get("label", "")})
                    else:
                        coords = [[c[0] * DISPLAY_SCALE, c[1] * DISPLAY_SCALE] for c in f["coords"]]
                        feats.append({"id": f["id"], "page": f["page"], "coords": coords, "label": f.get("label", "")})
            out_layers.append({
                "label_id": label["label_id"],
                "name": label["name"],
                "geometry_type": label["geometry_type"],
                "features": feats,
            })

    return jsonify({"layers": out_layers, "dpi": job.get("dpi", 300)})


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Session persistence
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@app.route("/session/<job_id>/save", methods=["POST"])
def save_session(job_id):
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        snapshot = {
            "job_id":         job_id,
            "saved_at":       datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
            "opts":           job.get("opts") or {},
            "labels":         job.get("labels") or [],
            "placed_pages":   job.get("placed_pages") or [],
            "page_sizes":     job.get("page_sizes") or [],
            "page_rotations": job.get("page_rotations") or [],
            "ref_lat":        job.get("ref_lat"),
            "ref_lon":        job.get("ref_lon"),
            "n_pages":        job.get("n_pages", 0),
        }
    user = get_current_user()
    _db_save_session(job_id, snapshot, user_id=user["id"] if user else None)
    return jsonify({"ok": True, "session_id": job_id})


@app.route("/sessions")
def list_sessions():
    user = get_current_user()
    sessions = _db_list_sessions(user_id=user["id"] if user else None)
    return jsonify({"ok": True, "sessions": sessions})


@app.route("/session/<job_id>/restore", methods=["POST"])
def restore_session(job_id):
    data = _db_load_session(job_id)
    if not data:
        return jsonify({"error": "session not found"}), 404
    job_dir = os.path.join(BASE_TMP, job_id)
    display_dir = os.path.join(job_dir, "display")
    display_paths = sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(display_dir, "*.png"))) if os.path.isdir(display_dir) else []
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        JOBS[job_id] = {
            "status":         "ready" if display_paths else "no_images",
            "log":            ["Session restored from save."],
            "progress":       1.0,
            "output_path":    "",
            "out_dir":        job_dir,
            "raw_paths":      [],
            "display_paths":  display_paths,
            "lines":          [],
            "text_items":     [],
            "opts":           data.get("opts") or {},
            "labels":         data.get("labels") or [],
            "placed_pages":   data.get("placed_pages") or [],
            "page_sizes":     data.get("page_sizes") or [],
            "page_rotations": data.get("page_rotations") or [],
            "ref_lat":        data.get("ref_lat"),
            "ref_lon":        data.get("ref_lon"),
            "n_pages":        data.get("n_pages", 0),
        }
    return jsonify({"ok": True, "job_id": job_id, "n_pages": data.get("n_pages", 0), "has_images": bool(display_paths)})


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Export format helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def _infer_schema(geom_type, features, max_name=64):
    props = {}
    if features:
        for k, v in features[0]["props"].items():
            key = k[:max_name]
            if isinstance(v, bool):   props[key] = "str"
            elif isinstance(v, int):  props[key] = "int"
            elif isinstance(v, float): props[key] = "float"
            else:                     props[key] = "str"
    else:
        props = {"page": "int"}
    return {"geometry": geom_type, "properties": props}


def _write_gdb_layers(out_dir, base_name, all_layers):
    gdb_path = os.path.join(out_dir, f"{base_name}.gdb")
    os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True)
    with fiona.Env():
        for layer in all_layers:
            if not layer["features"]:
                continue
            schema = _infer_schema(layer["geom_type"], layer["features"])
            crs = CRS.from_epsg(layer["crs_epsg"])
            with fiona.open(gdb_path, "w", driver="OpenFileGDB",
                            layer=layer["name"][:64], schema=schema, crs=crs) as dst:
                for feat in layer["features"]:
                    dst.write({"geometry": mapping(feat["geom"]),
                               "properties": {k[:64]: v for k, v in feat["props"].items()}})
    zip_path = os.path.join(out_dir, f"{base_name}.gdb.zip")
    with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, "w", zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zf:
        for root, _, files in os.walk(gdb_path):
            for f in files:
                full = os.path.join(root, f)
                zf.write(full, os.path.relpath(full, out_dir))
    return zip_path


def _write_shp_layers(out_dir, base_name, all_layers):
    shp_dir = os.path.join(out_dir, f"{base_name}_shp")
    os.makedirs(shp_dir, exist_ok=True)
    for i, layer in enumerate(all_layers):
        if not layer["features"]:
            continue
        safe = "".join(c for c in layer["name"] if c.isalnum() or c == "_")[:10] or f"lyr{i}"
        schema = _infer_schema(layer["geom_type"], layer["features"], max_name=10)
        crs = CRS.from_epsg(layer["crs_epsg"])
        with fiona.open(os.path.join(shp_dir, f"{safe}.shp"), "w",
                        driver="ESRI Shapefile", schema=schema, crs=crs) as dst:
            for feat in layer["features"]:
                dst.write({"geometry": mapping(feat["geom"]),
                           "properties": {k[:10]: v for k, v in feat["props"].items()}})
    zip_path = os.path.join(out_dir, f"{base_name}_shp.zip")
    with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, "w", zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zf:
        for root, _, files in os.walk(shp_dir):
            for f in files:
                full = os.path.join(root, f)
                zf.write(full, os.path.relpath(full, out_dir))
    return zip_path


def _write_geojson_layers(out_dir, base_name, all_layers):
    gj_dir = os.path.join(out_dir, f"{base_name}_geojson")
    os.makedirs(gj_dir, exist_ok=True)
    for i, layer in enumerate(all_layers):
        if not layer["features"]:
            continue
        safe = "".join(c for c in layer["name"] if c.isalnum() or c in "_-")[:64] or f"layer{i}"
        schema = _infer_schema(layer["geom_type"], layer["features"])
        crs = CRS.from_epsg(layer["crs_epsg"])
        with fiona.open(os.path.join(gj_dir, f"{safe}.geojson"), "w",
                        driver="GeoJSON", schema=schema, crs=crs) as dst:
            for feat in layer["features"]:
                dst.write({"geometry": mapping(feat["geom"]), "properties": feat["props"]})
    zip_path = os.path.join(out_dir, f"{base_name}_geojson.zip")
    with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, "w", zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zf:
        for root, _, files in os.walk(gj_dir):
            for f in files:
                full = os.path.join(root, f)
                zf.write(full, os.path.relpath(full, out_dir))
    return zip_path


def _write_kml_layers(out_dir, base_name, all_layers):
    """KML only supports WGS84. Pixel-coord (EPSG:3857) layers are skipped."""
    kml_dir = os.path.join(out_dir, f"{base_name}_kml")
    os.makedirs(kml_dir, exist_ok=True)
    for i, layer in enumerate(all_layers):
        if layer["crs_epsg"] != 4326 or not layer["features"]:
            continue
        safe = "".join(c for c in layer["name"] if c.isalnum() or c in "_-")[:64] or f"layer{i}"
        schema = _infer_schema(layer["geom_type"], layer["features"])
        try:
            with fiona.open(os.path.join(kml_dir, f"{safe}.kml"), "w",
                            driver="KML", schema=schema) as dst:
                for feat in layer["features"]:
                    dst.write({"geometry": mapping(feat["geom"]), "properties": feat["props"]})
        except Exception:
            pass  # KML driver unavailable for this layer — skip
    kmz_path = os.path.join(out_dir, f"{base_name}.kmz")
    with zipfile.ZipFile(kmz_path, "w", zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zf:
        for root, _, files in os.walk(kml_dir):
            for f in files:
                full = os.path.join(root, f)
                zf.write(full, os.path.relpath(full, out_dir))
    return kmz_path


def _write_dxf_layers(out_dir, base_name, all_layers):
    import ezdxf
    os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True)
    doc = ezdxf.new(dxfversion="R2010")
    msp = doc.modelspace()
    COLORS = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    for i, layer in enumerate(all_layers):
        if not layer["features"]:
            continue
        layer_name = layer["name"][:255]
        color = COLORS[i % len(COLORS)]
        if layer_name not in doc.layers:
            doc.layers.add(name=layer_name, color=color)
        gtype = layer["geom_type"]
        for feat in layer["features"]:
            geom = feat["geom"]
            dxfattribs = {"layer": layer_name}
            if gtype == "Point":
                x, y = geom.x, geom.y
                msp.add_point((x, y, 0), dxfattribs=dxfattribs)
            elif gtype == "LineString":
                coords = list(geom.coords)
                if len(coords) >= 2:
                    msp.add_lwpolyline([(x, y) for x, y in coords], dxfattribs=dxfattribs)
            elif gtype == "Polygon":
                coords = list(geom.exterior.coords)
                if len(coords) >= 3:
                    msp.add_lwpolyline([(x, y) for x, y in coords], close=True, dxfattribs=dxfattribs)
    out_path = os.path.join(out_dir, f"{base_name}.dxf")
    doc.saveas(out_path)
    return out_path


@app.route("/export/<job_id>", methods=["POST"])
def export(job_id):
    payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
    fmt = payload.get("format", "gdb").lower()
    ref_lat = payload.get("ref_lat")
    ref_lon = payload.get("ref_lon")
    export_token = payload.get("export_token")
    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        if not job:
            return jsonify({"error": "not found"}), 404
        if not job.get("labels"):
            return jsonify({"error": "no labels to export"}), 400
        n_pages = job.get("n_pages", 1) or 1

    # Payment gate
    user = get_current_user()
    if export_token:
        pages_auth = _db_use_export_auth(export_token, job_id)
        if not pages_auth:
            return jsonify({"ok": False, "error": "Invalid or already used export token"}), 403
        # token valid — proceed
    elif user and _db_deduct_credits(user["id"], n_pages):
        pass  # credits deducted — proceed
    else:
        # Need payment — create Stripe Checkout session
        try:
            session_obj = _stripe.checkout.Session.create(
                payment_method_types=["card"],
                mode="payment",
                line_items=[{
                    "price_data": {
                        "currency": "usd",
                        "unit_amount": 100,
                        "product_data": {"name": f"DrawBridge Export — {n_pages} page(s)"},
                    },
                    "quantity": n_pages,
                }],
                metadata={"type": "export", "job_id": job_id, "pages": str(n_pages)},
                success_url=BASE_URL + f"/?export_paid=1&job_id={job_id}",
                cancel_url=BASE_URL + f"/?export_cancelled=1",
            )
            with _db() as conn:
                conn.execute(
                    "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO payments (checkout_session_id, pages, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')",
                    (session_obj.id, n_pages)
                )
                conn.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            return jsonify({"ok": False, "error": str(e)}), 500
        return jsonify({"ok": False, "payment_required": True, "checkout_url": session_obj.url}), 402

    with JOBS_LOCK:
        job = JOBS.get(job_id)
        job["status"] = "exporting"
        job["export_format"] = fmt
        if ref_lat is not None:
            job["ref_lat"] = float(ref_lat)
            job["ref_lon"] = float(ref_lon)

    def _export():
        try:
            with JOBS_LOCK:
                labels     = job.get("labels") or []
                opts       = job.get("opts") or {}
                out_dir    = job.get("out_dir")
                page_sizes = job.get("page_sizes") or []
                export_fmt = job.get("export_format", "gdb")

            GAP = 100
            page_x_offsets, cumulative = [], 0
            for w, h in page_sizes:
                page_x_offsets.append(cumulative)
                cumulative += w + GAP

            def _transform_coord(x, y, page_idx, job):
                """Convert page pixel (x,y) to (world_x, world_y, epsg_int).
                Uses page placement transform if available, else pixel fallback.
                Returns (lon, lat, 4326) if georef available, else (x, y, 3857).
                """
                placed = None
                for p in (job.get("placed_pages") or []):
                    if p.get("page_idx") == page_idx:
                        placed = p
                        break
                if not placed or not placed.get("placed"):
                    return x, y, 3857

                ref_lat = job.get("ref_lat")
                ref_lon = job.get("ref_lon")
                if ref_lat is None or ref_lon is None:
                    return x, y, 3857

                canvas_x  = placed.get("canvas_x", 0.0)
                canvas_y  = placed.get("canvas_y", 0.0)
                rotation  = placed.get("rotation", 0.0)   # degrees, CSS clockwise
                user_scale = placed.get("scale", 1.0)
                fit_scale  = placed.get("fit_scale", 1.0)
                nat_w      = placed.get("nat_w", 1)
                nat_h      = placed.get("nat_h", 1)

                total_scale = fit_scale * user_scale
                W = nat_w * total_scale
                H = nat_h * total_scale

                # Page center in world canvas
                cx = canvas_x + W / 2
                cy = canvas_y + H / 2

                # Feature in world canvas (unrotated)
                fx = x * total_scale
                fy = y * total_scale

                # Relative to center, apply CSS clockwise rotation
                dx = fx - W / 2
                dy = fy - H / 2
                theta = _math.radians(rotation)
                dx_r = dx * _math.cos(theta) - dy * _math.sin(theta)
                dy_r = dx * _math.sin(theta) + dy * _math.cos(theta)

                # World canvas absolute
                wx = cx + dx_r
                wy = cy + dy_r

                lat, lon = _world_to_latlng(wx, wy, ref_lat, ref_lon)
                return lon, lat, 4326

            def _tc(x, y, f, job):
                """Dispatch coordinate transform based on coord_space stored on the feature."""
                if f.get("coord_space") == "world":
                    rl = job.get("ref_lat"); rn = job.get("ref_lon")
                    if rl is None or rn is None:
                        return x, y, 3857
                    lat, lon = _world_to_latlng(x, y, rl, rn)
                    return lon, lat, 4326
                return _transform_coord(x, y, int(f.get("page", 0)), job)

            def safe_name(name, fallback):
                safe = "".join(c for c in name if c.isalnum() or c in "_-").strip()
                return safe if safe else fallback

            base_name = opts.get("output_name") or f"job_{job_id}"

            # Build format-agnostic layer list
            all_layers = []
            for label in labels:
                gtype = label["geometry_type"]
                lname = safe_name(label.get("name", ""), f"layer_{label['label_id']}")

                if gtype == "point":
                    georef, pixel = [], []
                    for f in label.get("features", []):
                        x, y = f["coords"]
                        ox, oy, epsg = _tc(x, y, f, job)
                        (georef if epsg == 4326 else pixel).append(
                            {"geom": SHPoint(ox, oy), "props": {"page": int(f["page"]) + 1, "label": f.get("label", "")}})
                    if georef:
                        all_layers.append({"name": lname + ("_georef" if pixel else ""),
                                           "geom_type": "Point", "crs_epsg": 4326, "features": georef})
                    if pixel:
                        all_layers.append({"name": lname + ("_pixel" if georef else ""),
                                           "geom_type": "Point", "crs_epsg": 3857, "features": pixel})

                elif gtype == "line":
                    georef, pixel = [], []
                    for f in label.get("features", []):
                        raw = f.get("coords") or []
                        if len(raw) < 2:
                            continue
                        pidx = int(f.get("page", 0))
                        tr = [_tc(c[0], c[1], f, job) for c in raw]
                        epsg = tr[0][2]
                        coords = [(t[0], t[1]) for t in tr]
                        (georef if epsg == 4326 else pixel).append(
                            {"geom": SHLineString(coords),
                             "props": {"page": pidx + 1, "feature_id": int(f.get("id", 0)), "label": f.get("label", "")}})
                    if georef:
                        all_layers.append({"name": lname + ("_georef" if pixel else ""),
                                           "geom_type": "LineString", "crs_epsg": 4326, "features": georef})
                    if pixel:
                        all_layers.append({"name": lname + ("_pixel" if georef else ""),
                                           "geom_type": "LineString", "crs_epsg": 3857, "features": pixel})

                elif gtype == "polygon":
                    georef, pixel = [], []
                    for f in label.get("features", []):
                        raw = f.get("coords") or []
                        if len(raw) < 3:
                            continue
                        pidx = int(f.get("page", 0))
                        tr = [_tc(c[0], c[1], f, job) for c in raw]
                        epsg = tr[0][2]
                        ring = [(t[0], t[1]) for t in tr]
                        if ring[0] != ring[-1]:
                            ring.append(ring[0])
                        (georef if epsg == 4326 else pixel).append(
                            {"geom": SHPolygon(ring),
                             "props": {"page": pidx + 1, "feature_id": int(f.get("id", 0)), "label": f.get("label", "")}})
                    if georef:
                        all_layers.append({"name": lname + ("_georef" if pixel else ""),
